Publish.LongDescription:
# Overview This mod focuses on segment-based road editing. Instead of changing every road with the same name, it lets you select an exact path of connected road segments and apply changes only to that chosen route. The main goal is to give players more control over road naming, since the base game implementation is fairly limited. As a bonus, the mod also supports route designations, making it easy to add route names to highways, arterials, bypasses, and other road corridors.
The mod currently has two main modes, both of which can be accessed by clicking on a road segment.
# Road Route Naming ## (Work in Progress) This mode lets you assign major route numbers, such as A1, M2, or A8, to a selected road corridor. The original street names remain intact, but the chosen segments gain the route designation. This makes it possible to build routes across multiple streets without renaming the roads themselves, while avoiding unwanted parts of a road receiving the route number.
# Road Renaming This mode lets you rename only the specific road segments you select. That means you can create custom named road corridors without accidentally renaming the entire vanilla-defined “connected” road.
# Road Name Persistence Updating roads near renamed roads using this mod may cause the naming to be overridden by the game.
The mod does its best to ensure your name changes persist after the road is updated, such as when a new intersection is created on that road or the road is replaced with a different type.
If the mod cannot preserve your naming, you can simply use it again to apply the desired road name or route designation.
# Credits
- krzychu124 - Gave insights into how the aggregate system worked, and how to persist changes. - Bruceyboy24804 - Improving Json code.
# Compatibility
- Works with Road Name Remover

ChangeLog.Value:
Road Routes
* New Manage Routes menu, allows for viewing of saved all road routes. * Routes can now be configured, manipulated and deleted. * Saved routes can now be selected from the list or visually in the world * Added setting to show or hide advanced route details.
Fixes
* Fixed roads sometimes losing names or showing invisible names after renaming. * Fixed route names reverting after loading saves or restarting the game. * Fixed issues where renamed route roads could conflict with vanilla road naming. * Fixed route-numbered roads sometimes showing duplicate names. * A road aggregate that loses its name (becomes invisible) can now be restored / repaired using the rename mode. * Various mod performance improvements
Known Issues
* Renamed roads can sometimes still be overridden by road geometry changes / updates eg. using Traffic to change lanes and, adding, manipulating or removing road segments. Name persistence is still being improved.
